{{Infobox artifact
| name = bloodline armor
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Bloodline armor refers to a specialized type of protective gear that is summoned or manifested by users. The [[Akura clan]] possesses a well-documented version of this armor, though it presents significant challenges to the wearer; it is notoriously difficult to control, can cause clumsiness and reduced speed when covering the entire body, and places heavy pressure on the user's [[spirit]]. In combat, users may need to utilize [[madra]] to reinforce the armor against repeated strikes, and it is susceptible to being shattered by powerful attacks. Some instances of bloodline armor are described as appearing as massive, towering figures that dwarf the user.}}

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]]'s [[bloodline armor]] can turn her eyes amethyst.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16">''Wintersteel'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Mercy]] wears [[bloodline armor]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c13">''Bloodline'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Mercy]]'s [[bloodline armor]] was cut through.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16">''Reaper'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]]'s [[bloodline armor]] faded to essence around her body.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c26">''Waybound'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
